sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91438" key="puknorrw/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυκνο-ρρώξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶγος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥώξ</etym>) <sense id="n91438.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυκνορράξ</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
